reviews.review_msg: I have taken three courses with Sharla and all i have to say is i do not understand why she still has a job as a teacher. she is beyond useless. Sharla could'nt teach a class if she tried. She not once will be on time, however you can bet she will leave the students waiting 15 minutes at least every day.
He doesn't work at SFU anymore (I wonder why) but it's so obvious the reviews below are fake. His current reviews at the other university is a 2.7/5 average on a good day.

One of the most passionate people I've ever encountered. Michael makes course learning go beyond the curriculum and brings in current examples. He's super helpful if you see him outside of classand gives you a really good idea of what direction to take with your papers. Can't say enough good things about Markwick.
